events.title: The Atlantic Passage
events.scene: A crumpled letter arrives from a cousin in America, bearing passage money and tales of opportunity. The air in your village is thick with olive dust, the harbor a distant hum. The whole {surname} family gathers, the decision heavy.
events.researchNote: Mass emigration from Southern Italy to the Americas boomed in the late 19th century.

choices.text: We send {given_name} to stake our claim across the sea. The family here will save for passage.
choices.outcome: A piece of the {surname} family goes overseas, a new branch planted in foreign soil. Correspondence will be slow, hope will be constant.

choices.text: We are a whole family, {full_name} declares. We face this land's struggles together.
choices.outcome: The family remains unbroken in the old country, bound by shared hardship and a resolve to make a life here.

events.title: The Harvest's Burden
events.scene: The olive harvest is lean this year, and the landlord's agent, Signor Rossi, arrives at your meager plot demanding the full, usual rent. He speaks with a sneer, threatening to turn the {surname} family out into the dust-choked roads.
events.researchNote: Southern Italian land tenancy often involved harsh conditions and vulnerability to landlords.

choices.text: We plead with Signor Rossi, promising to work harder, offering a share of next year's crop.
choices.outcome: The agent, reluctantly, grants a small reprieve, but the {surname} name now carries the stain of supplication.

choices.text: {given_name} declares we will not pay until the harvest improves, calling on nearby families to stand with us.
choices.outcome: A tense standoff begins. Some neighbors support your courage, others fear reprisal. The landlord's agent retreats for now, but will surely return.

events.title: The Smuggler's Proposition
events.scene: Down at the crowded harbor, the air thick with the smell of diesel and salt, a man known only as 'il Pesce' approaches {full_name}. He whispers of profitable, albeit illegal, cargo runs between Sicily and the mainland – a fortune to be made beyond the law.
events.researchNote: Smuggling was a common illicit activity in the less policed coastal areas of Southern Italy.

choices.text: {given_name} agrees to the terms, seeing an opportunity to lift the family from poverty by any means necessary.
choices.outcome: The {surname} family begins a perilous, clandestine trade. Profits are swift, but so is the danger of discovery and entanglement with dangerous figures.

choices.text: Though tempted, {full_name} declines, unwilling to stain the family name with crime.
choices.outcome: The family's path remains narrow and hard-won, but their conscience is clear. 'il Pesce' respects the decision, though perhaps with a hint of pity.

events.title: The Parish Blessing
events.scene: Father Anselmo, the respected and influential parish priest, seeks out {full_name}. He offers the family a prominent role in the upcoming village festa and proposes a marriage alliance with a devout, well-regarded local family – solidifying the {surname} family's standing, but tying them closely to the Church.
events.researchNote: The Catholic Church held immense social and political power in Southern Italy during this era.

choices.text: {given_name} accepts, seeing the immense benefits of the Church's blessing and the proposed alliance.
choices.outcome: The {surname} family becomes a pillar of the parish, their name gaining considerable respect and influence within the community, albeit under the watchful eye of the clergy.

choices.text: {full_name} respectfully declines, wishing to keep the family's path independent of religious authority.
choices.outcome: The priest expresses disappointment, and while not ostracized, the {surname} family will find community opportunities harder to come by without the Church's explicit support.
